included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Trivandrum & Kanyakumari Sunset
itinerary.description: Arrive in Trivandrum. Visit Padmanabhaswamy Temple, Kovalam Beach, and drive to Kanyakumari in the evening to witness the spectacular sunset.

itinerary.title: Kanyakumari Sunrise & Travel to Kochi
itinerary.description: Watch the beautiful sunrise at Kanyakumari beach. Visit the Vivekananda Rock Memorial via ferry, then drive to Kochi in the afternoon.

itinerary.title: Wonderla Theme Park Thrills & Departure
itinerary.description: Spend a full day enjoying the high-thrill rollercoasters, family rides, and massive water pools at Wonderla Kochi before heading for departure.

title: Trivandrum, Kanyakumari & Wonderla: Coast & Theme Park
description: Enjoy a coastal exploration of Trivandrum and Kanyakumari, followed by a day of non-stop action at Wonderla Amusement Park. Visit historic temples, beaches, Vivekananda Rock, and enjoy top-tier amusement park rides.
highlights: Tour Padmanabhaswamy Temple and Kovalam Beach in Trivandrum
Witness the sunrise and sunset in Kanyakumari
Spend an exciting day at Wonderla Amusement Park
